title: csStandard
description: A performance modpack with some useful tweaks mixed in.
body:
# csStandard

It's an extremely optimized ModPack with some valuable tweaks mixed in. We have sodium, zoom, optifine texture support, more animations, and more!

I use this modpack on my Raspberry Pi 4 model B with only 4GB of RAM! My FPS is about 30 - 60 without a browser open. I can even run a server and play on it simultaneously!

This ModPack was mostly created to give my friends a nice list of performance mods they could use. I started adding other mods though like bridging mods, carpet, and lightmatica.

This ModPack is a nice collection of mods for whatever you could possibly be doing in the game. You hopefully shouldn't have to add any of your own mods, if so contact me and see if I can add them to the pack!

`VanillaTweaks_r282573.zip` is from [https://vanillatweaks.net](https://vanillatweaks.net)

If you don't like some of the resource packs or just want to customize your game to look a little nicer I would recommend [Vanilla Tweaks.](https://vanillatweaks.net)
